message:
feat(render,parser,layout): overhaul visual design to modern aesthetic, add hyperlink support and font-aware node sizing

The default theme looked dated (hard black strokes, tight spacing, no
hover feedback). This commit redesigns the entire visual output to match
a polished Stripe/Vercel-style aesthetic while adding clickable node
hyperlinks and proper font-metric-aware node sizing.

Visual design overhaul (fm-render-svg/theme.rs):
- Replace Default theme: swap hard black strokes (#333) for soft slate
  borders (#e5e7eb), muted edges (#9ca3af), off-white background (#f9fafb),
  and a Tailwind-aligned 8-color accent palette (blue, sky, emerald,
  violet, amber, rose, teal, indigo).
- Replace Dark theme: swap neon-on-navy for Slate-900 base (#0f172a) with
  cooler accent palette and higher-contrast text (#f8fafc).
- Replace Corporate theme: swap saturated blues for a professional
  blue-300/blue-700 palette with slate edges.
- Upgrade default font stack from system-ui to Inter with Google Fonts
  web font URL, bump weight from 400 to 500, size from 14px to 15px.
- Completely rewrite to_svg_style() CSS generation (now ~250 lines):
  - Node shapes get per-accent-class stroke coloring via CSS custom
    properties and color-mix(), with hover transitions and lift effect.
  - Special shape styling: notes get amber tint, clouds get accent-2
    tint, cylinders get accent-1 tint, stars/pentagons get thicker stroke.
  - Edge styling: hover highlights with accent-1, crosshair cursor,
    dashed/thick/back variants as CSS classes.
  - Edge labels: bordered pill with glassmorphism backdrop-filter on
    supporting browsers.
  - Cluster styling: dashed border, swimlane/C4 variants.
  - Marker/arrowhead transitions on edge hover.
  - prefers-reduced-motion media query disables all transitions.
  - Subtle background gradient via color-mix.
- to_svg_style() now takes a `shadows` bool parameter to control
  drop-shadow filter generation.

Node accent coloring (fm-render-svg/lib.rs):
- Add stable_accent_index(): FNV-1a hash of node ID mod 8, producing
  deterministic accent class assignment (fm-node-accent-1 through -8).
- Add node_shape_css_class(): maps all 21 NodeShape variants to CSS
  classes (fm-node-shape-rect, -diamond, -cloud, etc.).
- render_node() now emits both accent and shape CSS classes on node groups.

Hyperlink support (click/link directives):
- Add `href: Option<String>` field to IrNode (fm-core/lib.rs).
- IrBuilder::set_node_link() wires parsed link targets to the new field
  (fm-parser/ir_builder.rs).
- Mermaid parser: both inline link syntax and `click` directive now call
  set_node_link() (fm-parser/mermaid_parser.rs).
- SVG renderer: when a node has an href, wrap the entire node group in
  an <a> element with target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" and
  cursor:pointer style (fm-render-svg/lib.rs).
- Add ElementKind::A to the SVG element model (fm-render-svg/element.rs).

Font-metric-aware node sizing (fm-layout/lib.rs):
- compute_node_sizes() now uses FontMetrics::estimate_dimensions() to
  measure actual text width/height instead of the old fixed 8px/char
  heuristic. This eliminates label overflow for long text and tight
  boxes for short text.
- Remove the now-unused label_length_and_lines() helper.
- Increase default LayoutSpacing: node_spacing 48->72, rank_spacing
  72->112, cluster_padding 24->48 to match the wider aesthetic.
- Update fallback node size from (72, 40) to (84, 44).
- Update default font_size 14->15, line_height 1.4->1.5 in
  FontMetricsConfig and SvgRenderConfig.

DOT parser improvement (fm-parser/dot_parser.rs):
- strip_comments() now handles single-line block comments (/* ... */)
  by truncating at the block start. Previously these were ignored,
  causing downstream parse failures on DOT files with inline comments.

Canvas renderer alignment (fm-render-canvas/renderer.rs):
- Update default font stack to Inter, bump padding 20->28, switch
  strokes and fills to Tailwind slate palette to match SVG output.

Edge label refinement (fm-render-svg/lib.rs):
- Edge label background rects now have visible #cbd5e1 borders, 6px
  corner radius, and extra horizontal/vertical padding for readability.

Miscellaneous:
- Update SvgRenderConfig defaults: padding 20->48, rounded_corners 4->12.
- Rect shapes now get rounded corners (rx = rounded_corners * 0.55),
  subroutine inner rects get rx = rounded_corners * 0.45.
- Test helpers use ..Default::default() for IrNode construction now
  that the struct has an additional field.
- Add tests for deterministic accent indexing and shape class emission.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -329,6 +329,7 @@ pub struct IrNode {
     pub label: Option<IrLabelId>,
     pub shape: NodeShape,
     pub classes: Vec<String>,
+    pub href: Option<String>,
     pub span_primary: Span,
     pub span_all: Vec<Span>,
     pub implicit: bool,

@@ -40,17 +40,19 @@ pub struct CanvasRenderConfig {
 impl Default for CanvasRenderConfig {
     fn default() -> Self {
         Self {
-            font_family: String::from("system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif"),
+            font_family: String::from(
+                "'Inter', 'Avenir Next', 'Segoe UI', 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif",
+            ),
             font_size: 14.0,
-            padding: 20.0,
+            padding: 28.0,
             node_fill: String::from("#ffffff"),
-            node_stroke: String::from("#333333"),
+            node_stroke: String::from("#94a3b8"),
             node_stroke_width: 1.5,
-            edge_stroke: String::from("#333333"),
+            edge_stroke: String::from("#475569"),
             edge_stroke_width: 1.5,
-            cluster_fill: String::from("#f8f9fa"),
-            cluster_stroke: String::from("#dee2e6"),
-            label_color: String::from("#333333"),
+            cluster_fill: String::from("rgba(226,232,240,0.44)"),
+            cluster_stroke: String::from("rgba(148,163,184,0.78)"),
+            label_color: String::from("#0f172a"),
             auto_fit: true,
         }
     }

@@ -242,21 +242,13 @@ mod tests {
             id: "A".to_string(),
             label: None,
             shape: NodeShape::Rect,
-            classes: vec![],

-            span_all: vec![],
-            implicit: false,
-            members: vec![],

+            ..Default::default()
         });
 
         ir
